text:
Hey <@&1424461167883194418>, here's what shipped this week. 13 PRs merged, mostly shuffling models around to keep things fast and making the API responses actually make sense.

## Weekly Update - 2026-06-14

**🪑 Model Musical Chairs**
We shifted some routing around to keep generation reliable:
- Moved Wan and Qwen image/video off Alibaba over to Replicate
- Added Claude Fable 5 (via Bedrock) and Kimi k2.7 code (via OpenRouter)
- Pruna models are now routing through Replicate
- `qwen-coder-large` is now on OpenRouter

**✨ UI & Dashboard Cleanup**
- Dashboards now pull directly from the live model catalog
- Shipped a visual overhaul: single-accent colors, borderless UI, and a new icon system
- Restored the "copy model slug" button on the models page (because manually typing out slugs is tedious)

**🛠️ API Sanity & No-Build**
- Added a `@pollinations/ui` browser bundle so you can prototype without a build step
- Content policy rejections now correctly return a `422 Unprocessable Entity` instead of a generic `500` error
- Fixed boolean parsing for `stream` and `json` query params on text routes
- Fixed `wan-pro` image-to-video failing with 500s

**🌱 Community**
- Websim is now officially BYOP (Bring Your Own Pollen) compliant
- Added Wikimind to the learn section
